str.authority: Financial Intelligence and Enforcement Department (FIED) / Bank Negara Malaysia
str.notes: Suspicious Transaction Reports must be filed as soon as possible after forming suspicion. DAX operators registered with SC Malaysia are reporting institutions under the Anti-Money Laundering, Anti-Terrorism Financing and Proceeds of Unlawful Activities Act 2001 (AMLA). Filed via Bank Negara's STR Online Reporting System.

ctr.authority: Financial Intelligence and Enforcement Department (FIED) / Bank Negara Malaysia
ctr.notes: Cash Transaction Reports (CTR) required for cash transactions of MYR 25,000 or more. Filed within 10 business days.
